rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SERGE JOHN WHITE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues may include: 1) Petitioner requests distribution of firearms. Court to determine whether all appropriate steps have been taken for the proper transfer of firearms. 2) Two bank accounts are the community property of the Decedent and the surviving spouse, but the surviving spouse's interest was also included in this estate without an election under PC 13502. 3) Consents to non pro rata distribution of the firearms and the gold coin have not been filed. 4) Attorney requests extraordinary fees of $37,205, which includes $15,540 to resolve petitioner's dispute with objectors. 5) Release and satisfaction of all creditor's claims have not been filed. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Authority To Create Trust, Transfer Funds, And Terminate Guardianship Estate; Authority To Pay Child Care And Camp Expenses From Guardianship Estate
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/17/2023, as the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 06/20/2023) remain unaddressed: 1) No proposed order has been received. 2) Please provide the petitioner's income and expense declaration (FL-150 form). rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF GEORGINA LAXMI LOREK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/17/2023, as the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 06/20/2023) remain unaddressed: 1) No proposed order has been received. 2) A statement of each minor's age, health, and whereabouts required by LRSF 14.46(D)(1) must be provided. 3) The beginning account balance does not match the corrected inventory and appraisal on file for each minor's estate. A second corrected inventory and appraisal must be filed to list each minor's right to receive distribution from the probate estate as the only asset on hand at the beginning of this account. 4) No additional bond has been filed. 5) Supporting time records (bills) must be provided for the attorneys' fees. LRSF 14.52. An appearance may be required on 10/17/2023 if no satisfactory progress is shown to address the issues.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FREDERICO ALBERTO SILVA
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following procedural issues to be cleared: 1. Cash balance being deposited into one bank account, exceeding the FDIC limit. 2. Petition prays (#3) the surviving spouse's 50% community property interest in the real property be conveyed to her; however, only the decedent's 50% interests in the real property is subject to administration of this estate as Inventory and Appraisal set forth 50% interest. Also, spousal election under Prob. Code sec. 13502 not on file. If Petition seeks the court to rule on the surviving spouse's 50% interest, it appears such request needs to bring in a separate petition. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CLASSIE WASHINGTON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required on the sole issue of whether this petition should be taken off calendar for lack of progress, as the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 05/09/2023 and also posted as tentative rulings for 06/06/2023 hearing) remain unaddressed: 1) Item 3g(d) of the petition must be completed re James Riley as first-named executor. 2) Re item 8: i) The date of death must be provided for the decedent's spouse and two children. ii) The date of death of Moses Riley must be provided. iii) Did Elaine Hubbard leave any issue who survived her? 3) The decedent died more than 6 years ago. Please briefly explain why the petitioner delayed opening this probate. 4) The decedent's last name was spelled "Washinton" on the signature and witness pages of the will. If it was the decedent's aka, it must be added to item 1 of the DE-121 form, and new notice must be mailed and published. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
